snapshots.git_message: step_1: increase weight_decay to 5e-4 for improved regularization
snapshots.expected_effect: improved L2 regularization should reduce overfitting and lower val_bpb
snapshots.reason: higher weight decay was too strong, val_bpb regressed by 0.031

snapshots.git_message: step_2: switch optimizer from adam to sgd with momentum 0.9
snapshots.hypothesis: switch optimizer from adam to sgd
snapshots.expected_effect: SGD with momentum often generalizes better on CIFAR-10 than Adam
snapshots.reason: SGD converged poorly, likely needs higher LR schedule adjustment
